member.name: T:JustInTimeAlerts.Converters.ServiceButtonTextConverter
member.summary: Converts the IsServiceRunning boolean to a button label string.

member.name: T:JustInTimeAlerts.Converters.StringNotEmptyConverter
member.summary: Returns true when the bound string is not null/empty.

member.name: T:JustInTimeAlerts.Models.CalendarSource
member.summary: Represents a calendar data source (ICS URL or local file path).

member.name: P:JustInTimeAlerts.Models.CalendarSource.Url
member.summary: Remote ICS URL (null when loading from file).

member.name: P:JustInTimeAlerts.Models.CalendarSource.FilePath
member.summary: Local file path on the device (null when loading from URL).

member.name: P:JustInTimeAlerts.Models.CalendarSource.DisplayName
member.summary: Human-readable display name shown in the UI.

member.name: T:JustInTimeAlerts.Models.MeetingEvent
member.summary: Simplified representation of a calendar event derived from an ICS file.

member.name: P:JustInTimeAlerts.Models.MeetingEvent.Uid
member.summary: Unique identifier from the ICS UID field.

member.name: P:JustInTimeAlerts.Models.MeetingEvent.CalendarSourceId
member.summary: Source calendar that provided this event.

member.name: T:JustInTimeAlerts.Platforms.Android.Services.AndroidNotificationService
member.summary: Wraps the Android to post a status-bar notification whenever a meeting is about to start.

member.name: M:JustInTimeAlerts.Platforms.Android.Services.AndroidNotificationService.Notify(JustInTimeAlerts.Models.MeetingEvent)
member.summary: Posts an Android notification for the supplied .

member.name: T:JustInTimeAlerts.Platforms.Android.Services.BootReceiver
member.summary: Starts the automatically when the device reboots.

member.name: T:JustInTimeAlerts.Platforms.Android.Services.MeetingAlertForegroundService
member.summary: Android Foreground Service that keeps the app alive in the background. A fires every 60 seconds to run the logic engine.

member.name: T:JustInTimeAlerts.Services.CalendarSourceRepository
member.summary: Manages the list of objects that are persisted on the device using app preferences.

member.name: T:JustInTimeAlerts.Services.IcsParserService
member.summary: Fetches and parses ICS calendars from a URL or a local file path, returning strongly-typed objects.

member.name: M:JustInTimeAlerts.Services.IcsParserService.GetEventsAsync(JustInTimeAlerts.Models.CalendarSource,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads events from the given . Returns an empty list on failure so callers can handle errors gracefully.

member.name: M:JustInTimeAlerts.Services.IcsParserService.ParseIcsContent(System.String,System.Guid)
member.summary: Parses raw ICS text and returns a list of .

member.name: T:JustInTimeAlerts.Services.MeetingAlertService
member.summary: Core logic engine that decides which meetings need an alert right now. This is platform-agnostic; Android-specific notification triggering is handled by the platform service layer.

member.name: F:JustInTimeAlerts.Services.MeetingAlertService.AlertWindow
member.summary: The "just-in-time" window: a meeting is considered starting "right now" if its start time falls within the last .

member.name: M:JustInTimeAlerts.Services.MeetingAlertService.CheckAndAlertAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks all active calendar sources for meetings that are starting right now and raises for each unalerted meeting.

member.name: T:JustInTimeAlerts.Services.ProcessedMeetingCache
member.summary: Thread-safe cache that tracks which meeting UIDs have already triggered an alert. Uses a mapping UIDs to their meeting end times, enabling automatic eviction of entries after the meeting has been over for more than .

member.name: F:JustInTimeAlerts.Services.ProcessedMeetingCache.DefaultExpiry
member.summary: Default time after a meeting ends before its UID is evicted from the cache.

member.name: M:JustInTimeAlerts.Services.ProcessedMeetingCache.ShouldAlert(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the UID has not yet been recorded as alerted.

member.name: M:JustInTimeAlerts.Services.ProcessedMeetingCache.Contains(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the cache contains the specified UID.

member.name: M:JustInTimeAlerts.Services.ProcessedMeetingCache.MarkAlerted(System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Records a UID as alerted, storing the meeting's so the entry can be evicted once the meeting has been over long enough.

member.name: M:JustInTimeAlerts.Services.ProcessedMeetingCache.Evict
member.summary: Removes all entries whose meetings ended more than ago.

member.name: P:JustInTimeAlerts.Services.ProcessedMeetingCache.Count
member.summary: Returns the number of UIDs currently in the cache (for diagnostics).

member.name: T:JustInTimeAlerts.ViewModels.MainViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for the main page. Uses CommunityToolkit.Mvvm source generators for commands and observable properties.

member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.summary: A helper type providing cached, reusable instances for all properties generated with .

member.summary: The cached instance for all "IcsUrl" generated properties.

member.summary: The cached instance for all "IsServiceRunning" generated properties.

member.summary: A helper type providing cached, reusable instances for all properties generated with .

member.summary: The cached instance for all "IcsUrl" generated properties.
